author: reviewer-a1
text: Discover Weekly used to be magic, now it's the same five artists I already follow. The recommendations feel like a reminder feed of my own taste.

author: reviewer-a2
text: I save songs off Release Radar every week and forget them by the next. Nothing ever sticks into my rotation — discovery without adoption.

author: reviewer-a3
text: As a busy parent with two kids I have no time or energy to crate dig. I just want low-effort discovery that comes to me.

author: reviewer-a4
text: Stuck listening to the same 50 songs on repeat. The app never nudges me out of my comfort playlist, so I'm in a rut.

author: reviewer-a5
text: Please add a slider to control how adventurous the recommendations are. Some days I want comfort, some days a real stretch.

author: reviewer-a6
text: Good app but discovery recommends stuff so safe and cautious it's boring. I never find anything genuinely new.

author: reviewer-a7
text: I keep trying to get into jazz but bounce off it every time. I need a guided on-ramp that eases me in week by week.

author: reviewer-a8
text: Recommendations never explain why a track was picked. I don't trust a suggestion that comes with no reason.

author: reviewer-a9
text: When Discover Weekly actually nails it, it's pure magic and honestly the reason I pay for premium.

author: reviewer-a10
text: The algorithm is an echo chamber. It reinforces what I already play instead of expanding my taste into new artists.
